title: Tallus Organic Liquid Seaweed Fertiliser Concentrate 1L – Premium Spring Plant Food for Lawns, Flowers, Indoor Plants, Grass Fertiliser
features: MADE & USED IN THE UK – Produced by active horticulture professionals who rely on this fertiliser daily. Crafted in the UK for British gardens, ensuring proven results and trusted quality you can depend on.
STRONGER ROOTS & SOIL – Promotes deep root growth and improves soil structure, giving plants the strength to survive winter and bounce back in spring.

CONCENTRATED & ECONOMICAL – Cover up to 1,250 m2. Premium liquid concentrate made with Ascophyllum Nodosum seaweed. Dilutes easily for multiple uses, making it a cost-effective solution for regular garden care.
GREEN LAWNS – Used and tested by professionals in lawncare and sports pitches. Use it often and watch the difference.
VERSATILE GARDEN USE – Works as a lawn feed, tomato fertiliser, rose food, and general plant tonic. Apply with a watering can or sprayer for quick absorption and visible results.
description: Product Description Thallus Liquid Seaweed - Premium Autumn Fertiliser For Plants & Lawns Thallus Liquid Seaweed - Premium Autumn Fertiliser For Plants & Lawns Thallus Organic Seaweed Fertiliser is the premium autumn and winter feed trusted by UK horticulture professionals. Made with sustainably harvested Ascophyllum Nodosum , this concentrated formula is designed to strengthen lawns, vegetables, roses, and shrubs during the colder months. Unlike generic fertilisers, Thallus provides a complete balance of natural growth hormones, trace minerals, and bioactive compounds that improve soil health and resilience. Use it as an autumn lawn feed to harden turf, or apply across your garden to protect roots and prepare plants for a strong spring. Made and used in the UK by horticulture professionals Concentrated liquid formula for cost-effective feeding Organic, sustainable, and safe for family gardens Works for lawns, vegetables, flowers, and houseplants With Thallus, you’re not just feeding your garden — you’re giving it the seasonal care it needs to thrive.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not ingest. Use gloves and protective clothing when handling. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Do not apply in windy conditions to avoid drift and potential harm to nearby plants or animals. In case of accidental exposure or ingestion, seek medical advice immediately.
